name: Opulent Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters.
2. Sprinkle 3/4 cup of fried onions in the bottom of a greased 8-inch baking dish.
3. Arrange the oysters over the onions.
4. Pour cream over the oysters.
5. Sprinkle the remaining onions and cheese over the top.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Bake at 450 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes.
Yield: 4 servings
